mapper.select:
SELECT wr.id, wr.week_key AS weekKey, wr.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS userRealName, wr.week_start AS weekStart, wr.week_end AS weekEnd, wr.new_customer_count AS newCustomerCount, wr.follow_up_count AS followUpCount, wr.progress_advance_count AS progressAdvanceCount, wr.converted_count AS convertedCount, wr.task_completed_count AS taskCompletedCount, wr.progress_details AS progressDetails, wr.converted_details AS convertedDetails, wr.task_completed_details AS taskCompletedDetails, wr.summary, wr.issues, wr.next_week_plan AS nextWeekPlan FROM weekly_reports wr LEFT JOIN users u ON wr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE wr.is_deleted = 0
AND wr.user_id IN
#{uid}
ORDER BY wr.week_key DESC, wr.id DESC

SELECT wr.id, wr.week_key AS weekKey, wr.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS userRealName, wr.week_start AS weekStart, wr.week_end AS weekEnd, wr.new_customer_count AS newCustomerCount, wr.follow_up_count AS followUpCount, wr.progress_advance_count AS progressAdvanceCount, wr.converted_count AS convertedCount, wr.task_completed_count AS taskCompletedCount, wr.progress_details AS progressDetails, wr.converted_details AS convertedDetails, wr.task_completed_details AS taskCompletedDetails, wr.summary, wr.issues, wr.next_week_plan AS nextWeekPlan FROM weekly_reports wr LEFT JOIN users u ON wr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE wr.is_deleted = 0 AND wr.week_key = #{weekKey} AND wr.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT wr.id, wr.week_key AS weekKey, wr.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS userRealName, wr.week_start AS weekStart, wr.week_end AS weekEnd, wr.new_customer_count AS newCustomerCount, wr.follow_up_count AS followUpCount, wr.progress_advance_count AS progressAdvanceCount, wr.converted_count AS convertedCount, wr.task_completed_count AS taskCompletedCount, wr.progress_details AS progressDetails, wr.converted_details AS convertedDetails, wr.task_completed_details AS taskCompletedDetails, wr.summary, wr.issues, wr.next_week_plan AS nextWeekPlan FROM weekly_reports wr LEFT JOIN users u ON wr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE wr.is_deleted = 0 AND wr.id = #{id}
